DC  Motors is one of Southern California's leading dealers  of luxury and 
exotic cars. Since 1994 we have been  providing the ultimate selection of low 
mileage, late  model, luxury vehicles. All vehicles are dealer  inspected and 
certified so our customers can drive away  with peace of mind, and the knowledge 
that they are  getting a deal of the lifetime. DC Motors also provides  full 
financing services and access to any of your  automobile accessory needs. Our 
highly trained staff is  here to provide excellent customer service. 

If  you are concerned for your safety, or the safety of your  family, then 
this is the luxury sedan for you!! The  Major Protection Components of this 
Vehicle include:  Windows - Made of multilayered, bullet resistant glass.  The 
outer layers absorb energy from a bullet's impact.  The inner layers prevent 
glass fragments from entering  the vehicle. Frame - Covered with ballistic steel 
panels  that overlap, creating a protective shell around the  car. Fuel Tank - 
The tank's interior bladder suppresses  sparks and self-seals holes when 
punctured. Tires -  Composite inserts enable the car to be driven even if a  tire 
goes flat. It can travel up to 30 miles per hour  and be driven 30 miles. For 
more information, please  call DC Motors at (800) 730-MOTOR, or go online to  
DCMOTORCARS.

DC Motors is one of Southern California's leading dealers of luxury and exotic cars. Since 1994 we have been providing the ultimate selection of low mileage, late model, luxury vehicles. All vehicles are dealer inspected and certified so our customers can drive away with peace of mind, and the knowledge that they are getting a deal of the lifetime. DC Motors also provides full financing services and access to any of your automobile accessory needs. Our highly trained staff is here to provide excellent customer service.

If you are concerned for your safety, or the safety of your family, then this is the luxury sedan for you!! The Major Protection Components of this Vehicle include: Windows - Made of multilayered, bullet resistant glass. The outer layers absorb energy from a bullet's impact. The inner layers prevent glass fragments from entering the vehicle. Frame - Covered with ballistic steel panels that overlap, creating a protective shell around the car. Fuel Tank - The tank's interior bladder suppresses sparks and self-seals holes when punctured. Tires - Composite inserts enable the car to be driven even if a tire goes flat. It can travel up to 30 miles per hour and be driven 30 miles. For more information, please call DC Motors at (800) 730-MOTOR, or go online to DCMOTORCARS.
